subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-06-13
subcodes.first_line: Baha'u'llah declared that should Baha'ís dispute, even if it be regarding Baha'u'llah Himself, both are wrong.
subcodes.first_line_orig: اول در باب اختلاف بین احباء که حضرت بهاءالله فرموده اند که هر گاه اهل بهاء اختلاف کنند
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @contention and conflict, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
